'''鈭歯g-f-l''' ('''ngafala''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ductilize|ductilize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-f-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ductilize|ductilize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-f-l
|-
! Lemma
| ngafala
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngafalithi|ngafalithi]] || [[word:ngafaliji|ngafaliji]] || [[word:ngafalishi|ngafalishi]] || [[word:ngafali|ngafali]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngafaluthuth|ngafaluthuth]] || [[word:ngafalujuj|ngafalujuj]] || [[word:ngafalushush|ngafalushush]] || [[word:ngafal|ngafal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngafaluthu|ngafaluthu]] || [[word:ngafaluju|ngafaluju]] || [[word:ngafalushu|ngafalushu]] || [[word:ngafalu|ngafalu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngafalufuth|ngafalufuth]] || [[word:ngafalufuj|ngafalufuj]] || [[word:ngafalufush|ngafalufush]] || [[word:ngafaluf|ngafaluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngafalethe|ngafalethe]] || [[word:ngafaleje|ngafaleje]] || [[word:ngafaleshe|ngafaleshe]] || [[word:ngafale|ngafale]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngafalothoth|ngafalothoth]] || [[word:ngafalojoj|ngafalojoj]] || [[word:ngafaloshosh|ngafaloshosh]] || [[word:ngafal|ngafal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngafalotho|ngafalotho]] || [[word:ngafalojo|ngafalojo]] || [[word:ngafalosho|ngafalosho]] || [[word:ngafalo|ngafalo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngafalofoth|ngafalofoth]] || [[word:ngafalofoj|ngafalofoj]] || [[word:ngafalofosh|ngafalofosh]] || [[word:ngafalof|ngafalof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngafal忙th忙|ngafal忙th忙]] || [[word:ngafal忙j忙|ngafal忙j忙]] || [[word:ngafal忙sh忙|ngafal忙sh忙]] || [[word:ngafal忙|ngafal忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngafalathath|ngafalathath]] || [[word:ngafalajaj|ngafalajaj]] || [[word:ngafalashash|ngafalashash]] || [[word:ngafal|ngafal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngafalatha|ngafalatha]] || [[word:ngafalaja|ngafalaja]] || [[word:ngafalasha|ngafalasha]] || [[word:ngafala|ngafala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngafalafath|ngafalafath]] || [[word:ngafalafaj|ngafalafaj]] || [[word:ngafalafash|ngafalafash]] || [[word:ngafalaf|ngafalaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ngafalasha|ngafalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gongafalasha|gongafalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokingafalasha|gokingafalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngafaln眉sha|ngafaln眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gongafalnkn眉sha|gongafalnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokingafaln眉sha|gokingafaln眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngafalsh毛sha|ngafalsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongafalnksh毛sha|gongafalnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingafalsh毛sha|gokingafalsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngafalrosha|ngafalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongafalnkrosha|gongafalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingafalrosha|gokingafalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafalmusha|ngafalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongafalnkmusha|gongafalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafalmusha|gokingafalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ngafalsherasha|ngafalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gongafalnksherasha|gongafalnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokingafalsherasha|gokingafalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ngafalngasha|ngafalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gongafalnkngasha|gongafalnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokingafalngasha|gokingafalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngafalyasha|ngafalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongafalnkyasha|gongafalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokingafalyasha|gokingafalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ngafalyamasha|ngafalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gongafalnkyamasha|gongafalnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokingafalyamasha|gokingafalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngafaln眉sh毛sha|ngafaln眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongafalnkn眉sh毛sha|gongafalnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingafaln眉sh毛sha|gokingafaln眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngafaln眉rosha|ngafaln眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongafalnkn眉rosha|gongafalnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingafaln眉rosha|gokingafaln眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafaln眉musha|ngafaln眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongafalnkn眉musha|gongafalnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafaln眉musha|gokingafaln眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngafalsh毛n眉sha|ngafalsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongafalnksh毛n眉sha|gongafalnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingafalsh毛n眉sha|gokingafalsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngafalsh毛rosha|ngafalsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongafalnksh毛rosha|gongafalnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingafalsh毛rosha|gokingafalsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafalsh毛musha|ngafalsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongafalnksh毛musha|gongafalnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafalsh毛musha|gokingafalsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngafalron眉sha|ngafalron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongafalnkron眉sha|gongafalnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingafalron眉sha|gokingafalron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngafalrosh毛sha|ngafalrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongafalnkrosh毛sha|gongafalnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingafalrosh毛sha|gokingafalrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafalromusha|ngafalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongafalnkromusha|gongafalnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafalromusha|gokingafalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngafalmun眉sha|ngafalmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongafalnkmun眉sha|gongafalnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingafalmun眉sha|gokingafalmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngafalmush毛sha|ngafalmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongafalnkmush毛sha|gongafalnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingafalmush毛sha|gokingafalmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngafalmurosha|ngafalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongafalnkmurosha|gongafalnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingafalmurosha|gokingafalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ngafal|ngafal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ng忙f忙l|ng忙f忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hongafal|hongafal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hong忙f忙l|hong忙f忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohongafal|hohongafal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohong忙f忙l|hohong忙f忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉ngafal|n眉ngafal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ng忙f忙l|n眉ng忙f忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ngafal|n眉n眉ngafal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ng忙f忙l|n眉n眉ng忙f忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂ngafal|n茂ngafal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ng忙f忙l|n茂ng忙f忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ngafal|n茂n茂ngafal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ng忙f忙l|n茂n茂ng忙f忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lungafal|lungafal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lung忙f忙l|lung忙f忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulungafal|lulungafal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulung忙f忙l|lulung忙f忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lingafal|lingafal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ling忙f忙l|ling忙f忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilingafal|lilingafal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liling忙f忙l|liling忙f忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kongafal|kongafal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kong忙f忙l|kong忙f忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokongafal|kokongafal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokong忙f忙l|kokong忙f忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kengafal|kengafal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keng忙f忙l|keng忙f忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekengafal|kekengafal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeng忙f忙l|kekeng忙f忙l]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
